-- 1 of 3 --

Subject Line: Announcement and a quick favor...
Hi, Kevin Vandi here.
I hope you've all gotten a few "golden nuggets" from the information I have been sending your
way about running injury-free.
I need to ask you a small favor…
Lately, I have been getting tons of emails asking to teach my running system of how I get
runners injury free and running strong.
Even though lots of people have asked me to teach my system and provide education, I have
hesitated since I have 4 kids (soon to be 5) and a growing business, and it just wasn’t the right
time…
But now, because I have just received so many requests, and because I really do love this topic,
I’ve finally decided to spill the beans on my running system.
After literally years of work, I'm now putting the finishing touches on my long-awaited "Running
Blueprint" program. I love educating runners, and this has truly become a labor of love and at
times felt like remodeling a house!
I am finally crossing the t's and dotting the I's on the program and I could really use your help…
Before I release the course, I want to be sure I have covered everything and would love your
feedback, so I don't miss anything important.
This will only take 60 seconds. Can you go to this link and answer 1 simple question? It would
be a huge help.
Running Survey
Thanks so much,
Kevin
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Survey Monkey Survey:
Question:
What is your #1 question about running injury-free that I should absolutely put in this course?
Stats...
Email list 250 people
Open rate 33%
Completed survey 8.5% (21 responses)
Summarizing the responses, there were five main questions/topics:
1. best quadriceps strengthening exercises
2. Best ways to protect knees to run for a lifetime
3. What does proper running form look like
4. What are the best stretches for runners
5. Can form actually change, isn't it innate
So, these were exactly how I structured the 5 modules for the PLC and course. I had a great
deal of data from my lab to help despite the small (21) response.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
